[[money]]

# Firestore Database Schema

The database relies on three main collections at the root level: `users`, `dogs`, and `applications`.

## 1. `users` Collection
Stores profile data for all authenticated users.

**Document ID**: `uid` (Matches Firebase Auth UID)

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "displayName": "John Doe",
  "phoneNumber": "+15551234567",
  "role": "adopter", // or "admin"
  "createdAt": "timestamp",
  "lastLoginAt": "timestamp"
}
```

## 2. `dogs` Collection
Stores the profile and status of each dog in the ranch.

**Document ID**: Auto-generated by Firestore

```json
{
  "name": "Buddy",
  "breed": "Golden Retriever Mix",
  "ageMonths": 24,
  "weightLbs": 55,
  "gender": "male",
  "description": "Friendly and energetic. Loves to play fetch.",
  "status": "available", // "available", "pending", "adopted"
  "photos": [
    "gs://safe-haven-dog-ranch.appspot.com/dogs/{dogId}/photo1.jpg",
    "gs://safe-haven-dog-ranch.appspot.com/dogs/{dogId}/photo2.jpg"
  ],
  "medicalNotes": "Up to date on all vaccines. Neutered.",
  "addedBy": "admin_uid",
  "createdAt": "timestamp",
  "updatedAt": "timestamp"
}
```

## 3. `applications` Collection
Stores adoption applications linking a user to a specific dog.

**Document ID**: Auto-generated by Firestore

```json
{
  "userId": "user_uid",
  "dogId": "dog_uid",
  "status": "submitted", // "submitted", "under_review", "approved", "rejected", "withdrawn"
  "formData": {
    "hasFencedYard": true,
    "otherPets": "One 5yo cat",
    "hoursHomeAlone": 4,
    "veterinarianContact": "Dr. Smith, 555-987-6543",
    "housingType": "House",
    "rentOrOwn": "Own"
  },
  "documents": [
    "gs://safe-haven-dog-ranch.appspot.com/applications/{applicationId}/lease.pdf"
  ],
  "submittedAt": "timestamp",
  "reviewedAt": null,
  "reviewedBy": null,
  "notes": "Admin notes can be added here."
}
```
